summary_one_line_zh: 多模态定位、浏览器内后端和产品化收入口径同时在变
summary_one_line_en: Multimodal grounding, browser-native backends, and revenue metrics are shifting.

items.why_zh: 把“看懂图”推进到“精确指哪儿”，对 UI agent、视觉检索和截图自动化很关键。
items.why_en: Moves from understanding images to precise grounding; key for UI agents, visual search, and screenshot automation.
items.so_what_zh: 用它替换你现有的截图坐标/规则匹配，测一次端到端点击成功率。
items.so_what_en: Swap it into screenshot-to-click flows and measure end-to-end click success.

items.title_zh: 浏览器里跑 ASGI 应用
items.why_zh: Pyodide+service worker 让 Python 后端前移到浏览器，改变 demo、试玩版和离线产品的交付方式。
items.why_en: Pyodide plus service workers push Python backends into the browser, changing how demos, trials, and offline products ship.
items.so_what_zh: 把你一个内部工具做成纯前端试玩版，验证是否能去掉服务器依赖。
items.so_what_en: Turn one internal tool into a browser-only trial and see if the server can disappear.

items.why_zh: 消费计费的 run-rate 口径继续被放大，说明 AI 基础设施更像高频用量生意，而非一次性软件授权。
items.why_en: Consumption-based run-rate metrics reinforce that AI infra is becoming a usage business, not one-time software licensing.
items.so_what_zh: 重新按 token/会话/任务三层拆你的毛利，别只看月活和总收入。
items.so_what_en: Re-cut gross margin by token, session, and task—not just MAU and topline.
